title: Its Gonna Be Alright
lyrics: I'm going to start out there, you want to take this anywhere to go? It's going to be alright. You got to trust in you, trust in what you believe, trust in your faith. You know calm comes through. The bliss ones for you. Thanks. We got you feeling tonight, you're going to feel it tonight. We're going to feel you alright, it's going to be alright. We got you moving tonight, you're going to move tonight. We're going to move tonight. It's going to be alright. Step in the spot, let the bassline hit. Energy rising, can't fake this shit. Heart beat, sync when the DJ spins. Everybody locked in, let the moment begin. Hands up high, get your way into the sky. No stress, no weight, let the worries all fly. Yeah we vibing together, yeah we wanting the same. Tonight set fire, let it burn through the pain. No fear, no fight, we just chasing the night. Every move, every sound. Cause it's going to be alright. We got you feeling it tonight. We're going to feel you alright. It's going to be alright. We got you moving tonight. You're going to move tonight. We're going to go to the sunrise. It's going to be alright. We got you feeling it tonight. You're going to feel it tonight. We're going to feel you alright. It's going to be alright. We got you moving tonight. You're going to move tonight. We're going to go to the sunrise. It's going to be alright. Bassline, see the colors collide. Talk my heart beat, it's alright inside. Every smile, every step is a language we speak. When the four get five. Yeah, the soul get free, soul get free. From the back to the front, let the circles stay tight. From the lows to the highs, maybe touching the high. Living a moment, a moment, ain't no need for rewind. Cause the now is what we own and that now is divine. Cause we got you feeling it tonight. You're going to feel it tonight. We're going to feel you alright. It's going to be alright. We got you moving tonight. You're going to move tonight. We're going to go to the sunrise. It's going to be alright. Cause we got you feeling it tonight. You're going to feel it tonight. We're going to feel you alright. It's going to be alright. We got you moving tonight. You're going to move tonight. We're going to go to the sunrise. It's going to be alright. It's going to be alright.  I told you from the beginning. I told you from the beginning. I told you from the beginning.
